# Pull Request Template

## Description

**What does this PR do?**Clearly explain the purpose, changes, and scope of this PR. Include:

- Key features/bug fixes added.
- Technical decisions (if notable).
- Dependencies or migrations required.

**Related Issue(s)**
Fixes #IssueNumber | Related to #IssueNumber
_(Use "Closes #123" to auto-close linked issues on merge)_

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🛠 Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix/feature that modifies existing behavior)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD pipeline update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (ESLint/Prettier).
- [ ] I’ve tested my changes locally (e.g., `npm test`).
- [ ] I’ve added/updated unit tests (Jest, Cypress, etc.).
- [ ] Documentation is updated if required (README, JSDoc, etc.).
- [ ] Changes are compatible with mobile/responsive layouts (if applicable).

## Screenshots/GIFs (UI Changes)

| Before         | After          |
| -------------- | -------------- |
| [Old behavior] | [New behavior] |

_(Drag & drop images/GIFs here or link to Figma/Screen recordings)_

## Additional Notes

- Deployment requirements (env variables, DB updates).
- Open questions/TODOs for reviewers.
- Any temporary workarounds?
